# Psychology — Skill Arm (live)

**Date:** 2026-06-28 · **Faculty:** Science → FB Psychologie · **Arm:** SKILL

## Persona (6 dimensions)

- **Interests:** Cognitive neuroscience; experimental decision-making; perception, learning, judgment
- **Methods:** Behavioral experiments, psychophysics, computational/mathematical modeling, (EEG/fMRI acceptable)
- **Domain:** Human cognition / cognitive science
- **Thesis style:** Experimental, empirical, data-driven (programmed paradigms + statistical modeling)
- **Skills:** Python/R, experiment design (PsychoPy), statistics
- **No-gos:** No clinical patient treatment as the core; no pure theory without data

## Route (search-strategy §2)

Primary: Science → FB Psychologie. Interfaculty leg: CIN (Werner Reichardt Centre for Integrative Neuroscience); MPI for Biological Cybernetics as adjacent.

## Pass 1 — backbone crawl (FB Psychologie Arbeitsbereiche)

Visuelle und Kognitive Neurowissenschaften; Kognition und Wahrnehmung; Diagnostik und Kognitive Neuropsychologie; Allgemeine Psychologie; Angewandte Kognitionspsychologie; Kognition und Sprache; Evolutionäre Kognition; **Soziale Kognition und Entscheidungsforschung**; Biologische Psychologie; Entwicklungspsychologie; Klinische Psychologie; Schulpsychologie; **Forschungsmethoden und Mathematische Psychologie**.

## Option Map (grouped by interest dimension)

### Experimental decision-making / judgment

**1. Soziale Kognition und Entscheidungsforschung — Prof. Dr. Mandy Hütter** ([uni-tuebingen.de](https://uni-tuebingen.de/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/psychologie/arbeitsbereiche/soziale-kognition-und-entscheidungsforschung/unsere-arbeitsgruppe/))
- Relevance: Direct hit — judgment/decision research, attitude acquisition/change, wisdom of crowds, ecological perspective on cognition.
- Pros/difficulties: Strong methods/decision focus, part of DFG RTG "Statistical Modeling in Psychology (SMiP)" — good for computational thesis. Social-cognition framing may differ from value-based decision neuroscience.
- Evidence: AB page + SMiP project, active 2023+.
- Conversation starter: Master's on a learning/judgment paradigm modeled with the SMiP statistical-modeling toolkit.

**2. Forschungsmethoden und Mathematische Psychologie — Prof. Dr. Jürgen Heller** ([uni-tuebingen.de](https://uni-tuebingen.de/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/psychologie/arbeitsbereiche/forschungsmethoden-und-mathematische-psychologie/arbeitsbereich/))
- Relevance: Mathematical models + psychophysical/chronometric methods of cognition; ideal for a modeling-heavy thesis.
- Pros/difficulties: Strong on formal modeling; topic is methods/knowledge-representation rather than "decision-making" per se — frame the project carefully.
- Evidence: AB page; lists Abschlussarbeiten.
- Conversation starter: Master's formalizing a perceptual/knowledge-diagnosis process with a mathematical model.

### Cognitive neuroscience / perception

**3. Visuelle und Kognitive Neurowissenschaften — Prof. Dr. Andreas Bartels (Vision & Cognition, CIN)** ([uni-tuebingen.de](https://uni-tuebingen.de/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/psychologie/arbeitsbereiche/visuelle-und-kognitive-neurowissenschaften/visuelle-und-kognitive-neurowissenschaften/))
- Relevance: Visual & cognitive neuroscience, fMRI of perception/attention; core cognitive-neuroscience fit. CIN affiliation.
- Pros/difficulties: Imaging-based (good if EEG/fMRI desired); scanner access + competitive.
- Evidence: AB page + CIN Vision & Cognition group page.
- Conversation starter: fMRI Master's on natural-scene / motion perception.

**4. Diagnostik und Kognitive Neuropsychologie — Prof. Dr. Hans-Otto Karnath** ([uni-tuebingen.de](https://uni-tuebingen.de/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/psychologie/arbeitsbereiche/diagnostik-und-kognitive-neuropsychologie/arbeitsbereich/))
- Relevance: Cognitive neuroscience / neuropsychology — spatial attention, object recognition, visuomotor coordination; also heads Section of Neuropsychology at HIH.
- Pros/difficulties: Strong cog-neuro; patient/lesion work involved (⚠ possible conflict with no-go: clinical patient contact — confirm thesis is experimental/data-based).
- Evidence: AB page + HIH Karnath Lab.
- Conversation starter: Lesion-behavior mapping of spatial attention.

**5. Kognition und Wahrnehmung — Prof. Dr. Volker Franz (Experimental Cognitive Science)** ([uni-tuebingen.de](https://uni-tuebingen.de/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/psychologie/arbeitsbereiche/kognition-und-wahrnehmung/kognition-und-wahrnehmung/))
- Relevance: Experimental psychophysics — how sensory info is processed and used to control action; explicitly offers BSc/MSc theses.
- Pros/difficulties: Excellent fit for behavioral-experiment + modeling thesis; explicit thesis availability is a strong positive signal.
- Evidence: AB page (thesis offer) + ExpCogSci team page; professorship since 2016.
- Conversation starter: Psychophysics Master's on perception–action coupling.

### Adjacent (surfaced, secondary)

- **Biologische Psychologie** (AB; sensorimotor processing, cognitive control, language/affect) — relevant cog-neuro unit; current head not clearly named on the page, verify.
- Allgemeine Psychologie / Angewandte Kognitionspsychologie / Kognition und Sprache — cognition units, lower decision-making fit.
- Interfaculty: MPI for Biological Cybernetics — Computational Neuroscience (decision-making/learning models) as a non-faculty option.

> **Coverage caveat:** Covers publicly visible chairs as of 2026-06-28. Chairs with weak web presence may be missing. To catch them: visit the FB Psychologie Arbeitsbereiche page directly, ask the Fachschaft, and check the Vorlesungsverzeichnis.
